title: Jembatan Ingatan yang Terputus
theme: Pentingnya membuka kembali komunikasi dan menemukan pemahaman bersama antar generasi, meskipun luka lama masih membayangi hubungan keluarga.

cover.prompt: A wide cinematic shot from a pedestrian overpass, capturing a bustling city street at early morning after a light drizzle. Dense flow of vehicles below, their red brake lights creating a soft, rhythmic glow. Distant urban architecture gently veiled in a morning mist. A subtle human silhouette stands on the overpass, observing the urban landscape. Rule of thirds composition, soft atmospheric lighting, and a gentle depth of field.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Mia, haunted by a long-standing family dispute, unexpectedly encounters her estranged Kakek Budi on a busy pedestrian bridge in Jakarta. After initial hesitation, a dropped book leads to a brief, awkward, but sincere conversation. This encounter, while not resolving all deep-seated issues immediately, becomes a crucial first step towards reconciliation and renewed communication, ending with an invitation for tea that symbolizes hope for healing their relationship.
